The Paris Summer Games are in full swing, and the Nanjing Museum in east China's Jiangsu Province is offering a captivating glimpse into the origins of the Olympic spirit with its exhibition, "The Glory of the Aegean Sea: An Exploration of Ancient Greek Civilization." Featuring artifacts such as bronze discuses, oil containers, and tripodal cauldrons, this exhibit brings the ancient Greek Olympics to life, allowing visitors to explore the rich cultural heritage of Greece some 3,000 years ago. The show runs until October 20th, celebrating the connection between past and present Olympic traditions.
